title: "Tag der Raumfahrt" in Berlin: Space Cafe Clip
excerpt: Alexander Schmidt, co-founder of Orbint GmbH, sat down with SpaceWatch.Global TV to discuss the future of satellite-based signal intelligence and Orbint's mission.
body:
Alexander Schmidt, co-founder of Orbint GmbH, sat down with SpaceWatch.Global TV to dive into the future of satellite-based signal intelligence and Orbint's mission to deliver precise, actionable insights through advanced orbital technology.

Watch Interview →
